text: Hi Sam, could you send me the Q3 report when you get a chance? No rush at all — thanks so much!
Send me the slides before the meeting.
Hey, the numbers in your spreadsheet are wrong again. Fix them by end of day.
Thanks for jumping in on the release yesterday — you saved us. Could I ask one more favor and have you look at the changelog too?
Per my last email, the deadline was Friday.
Can you review my PR today?
I noticed the build is failing. Do you have a minute to look at it together?
This is unacceptable. I need the corrected invoice within the hour.
Would you mind terribly if I moved our 1:1 to Thursday? Something urgent came up on my end.
FYI the client meeting moved to 9am.
I appreciate the effort, but this draft misses the point entirely. Let's set up time to realign.
Who approved this design? We need to talk before anything else ships.
